QA_GATE_XLSX_01.description: Hardcoded values are not colored Blue (RGB: 0,0,255).
QA_GATE_XLSX_01.resolution: Modify python openpyxl code to apply Font(color='0000FF') to static inputs.
Append usage instructions for scripts/recalc.py to the final output.

QA_GATE_DOCX_01.description: Standard quotes used instead of XML entities.

QA_GATE_PDF_01.description: PDF is missing required title or author metadata.
QA_GATE_PDF_01.resolution: Populate PDF metadata fields title and author during document creation.

QA_GATE_PDF_01.description: PDF content is image-only without selectable text.
QA_GATE_PDF_01.resolution: Generate a text layer or use native text rendering unless OCR/image-only output is requested.

QA_GATE_JSON_01.description: Output does not validate against declared JSON schema.
QA_GATE_JSON_01.resolution: Validate output against schema and correct all validation errors before final response.

QA_GATE_JSON_01.description: Unexpected fields found outside strict output contract.
QA_GATE_JSON_01.resolution: Remove all undeclared fields or extend the schema through controlled versioning.

QA_GATE_AEC_01.description: Output omits coordinate reference system/projection details.
QA_GATE_AEC_01.resolution: Include CRS/EPSG information in metadata and delivery notes.

QA_GATE_AEC_01.description: Mixed or unspecified unit systems across AEC artifacts.
QA_GATE_AEC_01.resolution: Normalize units and declare canonical unit system before final output.
